failures.description: The Executor fabricated an answer unsupported by the tool result: it claimed 11 options and record 0000000000 instead of reporting the 4 returned matching skateboard items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to answer which available bamboo-deck Skateboards cost more than $194.56 using ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The tool returned 4 matching items with specific item_ids and prices. At index 4, the Executor had all required information but produced 'There are 11 options available, per record 0000000000,' which is not present in the tool output and contradicts the count of 4. This invented count and record id were then accepted by the Evaluator, so the failure was not resolved.
